title: Add AIMANA Asparagus to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AIMANA Asparagus](https://github.com/rontea/AIMANA-Asparagus) to build
- A local-first Digital Asset Management (DAM) system that combines asset organization with an AI-powered workspace for generating and managing multimedia content, including images, video, audio, chat i

Fixes #12015

gist.headline: Fresh Asparagus in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: AIMANA Asparagus just sprouted in our community apps! It's a local-first digital asset manager that brings an AI-powered workspace right to your files.
gist.summary: Added AIMANA Asparagus, a local-first Digital Asset Management (DAM) system with an integrated AI workspace for multimedia generation, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover AIMANA Asparagus in the ecosystem to organize and generate images, video, audio, and chat content locally.
gist.visual_concept: The app is named 'AIMANA Asparagus' and focuses on Digital Asset Management (organizing files). The visual should feature Polly the bee in a greenhouse or garden setting, organizing glowing digital asparagus stalks into neat, folder-like crates, representing the DAM aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, happily organizing glowing digital asparagus stalks into neat wooden crates inside a lush greenhouse. A retro computer monitor nearby displays organized folders and multimedia files. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, happily organizing glowing digital asparagus stalks into neat wooden crates inside a lush greenhouse.
